parameters.name: Indirect Bilirubin (Unconjugated)
parameters.formula: Indirect Bilirubin = Total Bilirubin - Direct Bilirubin

parameters.name: Total Cholesterol/HDL Ratio
parameters.formula: TC/HDL Ratio = Total Cholesterol / HDL Cholesterol

parameters.name: Apo B/Apo A1 Ratio
parameters.formula: Apo B/Apo A1 Ratio = Apo B / Apo A1

parameters.name: CD4/CD8 Ratio
parameters.formula: CD4/CD8 Ratio = CD4 Count / CD8 Count

parameters.name: CSF/Serum Glucose Ratio
parameters.formula: CSF/Serum Glucose Ratio = CSF Glucose / Serum Glucose

parameters.name: SAAG (Serum-Ascites Albumin Gradient)
parameters.formula: SAAG = Serum Albumin - Ascitic Fluid Albumin

parameters.name: Total Sperm Count
parameters.formula: Total Sperm Count = Sperm Concentration × Volume
